turns.question: Good morning! Did you sleep well?
turns.answer: I did, thanks -- feeling pretty refreshed.

turns.question: Morning! You're here early today.
turns.answer: Yeah, I wanted to beat the traffic for once.

turns.question: Good afternoon, how's your day going so far?
turns.answer: Pretty good so far, keeping busy.

turns.question: Afternoon! Have you had lunch yet?
turns.answer: Just finished, actually -- feeling much better now.

turns.question: Good evening, long day at the office?
turns.answer: You could say that, I'm ready to head home.

turns.question: Evening! Are you heading out soon?
turns.answer: Yeah, just wrapping a few things up first.

turns.question: Morning, coffee's ready if you want some.
turns.answer: Oh, perfect timing, I definitely need it.

turns.question: Good morning, sunshine, how are we feeling today?
turns.answer: Honestly, still half asleep, but getting there.

turns.question: Afternoon already -- has the day flown by for you too?
turns.answer: Seriously, I can't believe it's already this late.

turns.question: Evening, how was the rest of your day?
turns.answer: Pretty uneventful, in a good way.

turns.question: Morning! Big day ahead of you?
turns.answer: Kind of, I've got a few meetings lined up.

turns.question: Good afternoon, did you manage to grab a break yet?
turns.answer: Not yet, but I'm hoping to soon.

turns.question: Good evening, any plans for tonight?
turns.answer: Nothing major, just relaxing at home.

turns.question: Morning, how'd you sleep after last night?
turns.answer: Better than expected, honestly.

turns.question: Afternoon, are you holding up okay?
turns.answer: Yeah, just running on a lot of coffee.

turns.question: Evening already, time really flew today.
turns.answer: Tell me about it, I barely noticed.

turns.question: Good morning! Ready to take on the day?
turns.answer: As ready as I'll ever be.

turns.question: Afternoon, how's the second half of your day looking?
turns.answer: A bit lighter than the morning, thankfully.

turns.question: Good evening, dinner plans tonight?
turns.answer: Just something simple at home, I think.

turns.question: Morning, you're up bright and early.
turns.answer: Couldn't sleep much, so I figured I'd get a head start.

turns.question: Afternoon, has it been a productive day?
turns.answer: Surprisingly, yes -- got a lot done.

turns.question: Good evening, winding down for the night?
turns.answer: Trying to, still got a few things to finish.

turns.question: Morning, how's the weather looking out there?
turns.answer: Actually pretty nice, sunny for once.

turns.question: Afternoon, did you take a lunch break yet?
turns.answer: Yeah, just got back from a quick one.

turns.question: Good evening, how was your commute home?
turns.answer: Not bad, lighter traffic than usual.

turns.question: Morning, feeling good about today?
turns.answer: Yeah, actually looking forward to it.

turns.question: Afternoon, are you off soon or still stuck here a while?
turns.answer: Unfortunately still here for a couple more hours.

turns.question: Good evening, any big plans for the weekend coming up?
turns.answer: Nothing set in stone yet, we'll see.

turns.question: Morning, you look wide awake today.
turns.answer: Ha, don't be fooled, it's mostly the coffee.

turns.question: Good evening, glad the day's finally over?
turns.answer: Honestly, more than you know.
